texto: No one has ever held me so tightly. It's a shock to matter this much. It isn't like arms are around me, it's more like a house, as if he has made a house around me. As he did around Tommy.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Kelle Groom: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a amor. O trecho “No one has ever held me so tightly. It's a shock to matter this much. It isn't like arms are arou…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que amor, grief, love pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de luto e love.
